description.en: Post-2000 P&G under A.G. Lafley. Goal: 50% of innovations from outside (vs ~15%). Met by 2007. Three bridges: technology entrepreneurs scouting outside, internet platforms like InnoCentive, YourEncore re-engaging retired industry scientists. R&D productivity +85% on flat spend.
description.zh: Lafley 主导下的宝洁(2000 年后)。目标:让 50% 的创新来自外部(此前约 15%)。2007 年达成。三座桥:技术企业家在外部寻找、像 InnoCentive 这样的互联网平台、让退休行业科学家重新接入的 YourEncore。在投入大致持平的情况下,研发产出率 +85%。
